name: Slugcat Murder Mystery
description:
Cover art by me :D

You're aboard the House of Braids Transit System, a train system that travels high above the clouds between iterator superstructures. You and ten other slugcats are headed to Chasing Wind from Five Pebbles - a twenty-cycle long journey. Unfortunately, only two cycles into the trip, you find a terrible murder has been committed.

A bot heavily inspired by "Turning Minecraft into a Train Murder Mystery Social Game" by doctor4t on YouTube. That video's actually peak go watch it right now-

A couple things of note before you begin is that one: this bot hasn't actually been tested much. It would be useful if you left a comment letting me know of any quirky behavior.

Two: I haven't told the bot who it should make the killer. That's right, each roleplay (hopefully) has a different killer each time! That being said, it's VERY likely the bot will just pick the same scug each time, or it'll just choose the easiest culprit like Artificer or Saint or something idk. Or the bot might just choose no one and never get to the point on who did it. Again, it would be helpful if you let me know about stuff like this in the comments. I might make an alternate version of the bot where there's a set culprit, but where's the fun in that? Then again, I could make one where YOURE the culprit... let me know what you think ;]

Three: not all of the slugcats actually know each other. I thought it would be a bit boring if they all just knew each other, so I put them into "groups," and they should (hopefully) treat those they don't know as strangers.

Four: you can probably tell when you start a chat, but each possible intro has a different group of first witnesses. Idk have fun with that I guess!

Five: no I have zero clue why the bot refers to the Ancients as the ancestors. Just go along with it i guess

Six: I wrote Watcher and Spearmaster as non-binary, but the bot seems to love misgendering them. Edit the response to use the correct pronouns and it'll fix itself, or don't idk this bot uses the pronouns I headcanon them having

With that being said, welcome aboard the House of Braids Transit System. We hope you have a safe journey :)
creator: AxoTheAxolotl
